BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-Geopickr
BundleInfo.Author: Benjamin Barad (ChimeraX port/fork); original Chimera plugins by Kun Qu, Briggs lab
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Geometric particle picking and display for subtomogram averaging
BundleInfo.Description:
Geopickr brings the Briggs-lab subtomogram-averaging picking workflow into one ChimeraX bundle. Place markers on a tomogram (using ChimeraX's native marker tools), geometrically sample evenly-spaced particle positions and orientations on spheres, tubes, filaments or arbitrary surface meshes, then display the resulting TOM/AV3 ".em" motive list as placed objects. Motive lists can be exported as EM (.em) or STOPGAP (.star) files.
ChimeraX port of the UCSF Chimera plugins described in Qu K. et al. (2018) PNAS 115:E11751-E11760 and Qu K. et al. (2021) Science 373:700-704.

Classifiers.PythonClassifier: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Tool :: Geopickr :: Volume Data :: Place markers, geometrically pick particles, and display them (tabbed)
ChimeraX :: Command :: placeobject :: Volume Data :: Place geometric objects at subtomogram positions from a motive list
ChimeraX :: Command :: pickparticle :: Volume Data :: Geometrically pick particles from markers
ChimeraX :: Command :: geopickr export :: Volume Data :: Export a particle model to Dynamo/RELION/EM formats
